title: Kal Shah
compiled_truth: Kal Shah is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-13), Kal Shah sent 58 and received 489 emails, totalling 547 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (21), [Andy Zipper](people/andy-zipper) (10), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (9), [Mark Taylor](people/mark-taylor) (9), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, archive, bill_williams_iii, deleted_items, inbox, tw_commercial_group.
